verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You've been to the doctor and he just shook his head. So many nights you've suffered lying in bed. But you can't seem to make it. Your body is ill. Friend God likes to work when nothing else will.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God likes to work When your back's to the wall When faith's in the balance And you're just about to fall. So there'll be no mistaking when He blesses and heals Oh God likes to work when nothing else will.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You've met with the banker. He said no with regret. You've tried everyway just to get ahead. But you're hoping and praying for a miracle still. Oh God likes to work when nothing else will.
